codeReview.summary: Fix correctly addresses the original issue where PermissionTier::Ask was blocked like Deny. The fix changes is_allowed() to treat Ask as Auto (auto-approve), consistent with hybrid.rs which already had this pattern. Documentation added explains the tier semantics.

summary: Review PASS: Fix commit b81ad90 correctly addresses the blocking issue where PermissionTier::Ask was treated identically to Deny. The change adds Ask to the permitted tiers in is_allowed() and includes documentation. The fix is minimal (7 lines) and consistent with existing hybrid.rs behavior at line 121 which already used PermissionTier::Auto | PermissionTier::Ask. No new issues introduced.
